name: Ceramic Coffee Mug
description: Hand-thrown ceramic mug with a comfortable handle and a classic glaze. Holds 12oz and is dishwasher safe.

name: Linen Tote Bag
description: Durable natural linen tote with reinforced handles. Perfect for grocery runs or a day at the beach.

name: Soy Wax Candle
description: Clean-burning soy wax candle with a cotton wick. Available in lavender and eucalyptus scents. Burns for up to 40 hours.

name: Bamboo Cutting Board
description: Sustainably sourced bamboo cutting board with juice grooves. Naturally antibacterial and easy on knife edges.

name: Stainless Steel Water Bottle
description: Double-wall insulated bottle that keeps drinks cold for 24 hours or hot for 12. BPA-free with a leak-proof lid.
